[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A man in a dark suit and black traditional cap holds up a white sign with large bold text, set over a dark financial-style graph background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a person standing front-facing and holding a rectangular white sign with both hands at chest level. The sign displays the text “gelo kink” in large, bold, black lowercase letters. The person wears a dark suit jacket with a visible small lapel pin on the left side, a white shirt, and a red necktie. A black traditional cap sits on his head. His face is centered, with a neutral-to-slightly smiling expression, and he looks toward the camera.

Setting:
The background is a dark, screen-like graphic featuring a green line chart with labeled time markers and horizontal grid lines, resembling a financial or stock chart. The lighting on the person is even and bright compared to the dark background, making him and the sign stand out.

Visual Details:
Colors include dark navy/black tones in the background and suit, green lines and accents in the graph, and a red tie. The chart’s line runs upward from left to right, ending near the right side. The composition is centered: the person’s head and sign align in the middle of the image, with the graph spanning the backdrop.

Visible Text:

Practical Summary:
The image shows a man holding a white sign with the words “gelo kink” in large black letters. Behind him is a dark background with a green upward-trending line chart and multiple numeric and date labels.
